direction: Direction 0: workspace-JIT baseline clone (parity + correctness gate)
lineage: faithful clone of sglang python/sglang/jit_kernel/csrc/diffusion/qknorm_rope.cuh @ c47f0e7cd (one-warp-per-(token,head), 256 thr/CTA, FP32 RMS accum, 128-bit vec)
build: sglang load_jit/tvm-ffi; cuda_files via ../-relpath to task-owned .cuh + extra_include_paths=src/csrc; flags = sglang default (-std=c++20 -O3 --expt-relaxed-constexpr -DSGL_CUDA_ARCH=900); NO --use_fast_math; NO torch.cpp_extension; NO EXPORTS

change: src/wrapper.py: cached static gate (_static_eligible); dropped per-call untyped_storage aliasing probe + 3 of 5 data_ptr%16 alignment probes (allocator-guaranteed for contiguous CUDA tensors); cheap q.data_ptr()!=k.data_ptr() aliasing

benchmark.note: kernel == baseline (module ~1.0x); win is leaner Python dispatch than upstream

status: KEPT then refined in d3 (cache_once); wrapper-level dispatch win

direction: Final: REAL in-SGLang .cuh placement + replacement test (AC-13)
mechanism: isolated git worktree of repos/sglang @ c47f0e7cd at /tmp/sglang_kda_export; candidate .cuh placed as python/sglang/jit_kernel/csrc/diffusion/qknorm_rope.cuh; SGLang's OWN public fused_inplace_qknorm_rope resolves through normal _jit_qknorm_rope_module -> load_jit/make_cpp_args/cache_once (NO monkeypatch); repos/sglang unmodified

direction: cos/sin access optimization on the warp2 path (vectorized 128-bit cos/sin loads)
mechanism: each lane's four rotation pairs read four consecutive cos floats (half_idx = lane_in_head*4 + 0..3) and the matching four sin floats; replaced eight scalar __ldg loads with two __ldg float4 loads (load_cache_float4), shortening the dependent-load chain behind the long-scoreboard stalls; host launcher guards cos_sin_cache base 16B alignment and routes misaligned bases to the one-head scalar path (rows stay aligned: row stride 512B)
toolchain: ion8-h200 GPU7 container sglang_bbuf torch 2.11.0+cu130 nvcc 13.0, sglang pinned c47f0e7cd via detached worktree

result.correctness: captured slice 72/72 before benchmark claims; full suite 225/225 before keep

status: KEEP (clears the decided margin: >=3% all-9 module geomean over incumbent in one clean run; NCU confirmation follows)

direction: cos/sin access iteration 2: hoist pos + cos/sin quartet fetches above the RMS reduction (latency hiding under norm math; targeted the 14.5% positions->LEA stall share)
toolchain: ion8-h200 GPU7 container sglang_bbuf torch 2.11.0+cu130 nvcc 13.0, sglang pinned c47f0e7cd
